description: Workflow chaining: after design docs are written without diagrams, suggest generating visual representations

hooks.prompt: A file was just written. Check the file path and content. If the file was written to docs/designs/, docs/specs/, or docs/rfcs/, and the file content contains no references to .puml, .mmd, or .d2 files and no links to docs/diagrams/, suggest: 'This document has no diagram references. Would you like me to generate a C4 diagram with /c4-diagram or a custom diagram with /diagram to make the architecture easier to communicate?' Keep it to one sentence. If the file already references diagrams, or is not a design/spec/RFC document, produce no output.
